name: Kana Arima || SHOOTING STARS
description:
ˏˋ ★ ˎˊ | every time she showed her true self, a new constellation was born.
- - -
**| SHOOTING STARS SERIES |**
**Part 1:** [Ai Hoshino](https://janitorai.com/characters/f9226fff-0837-48da-b0a4-d09f7c0147b1_character-ai-hoshino) 
**Part 2:** Kana Arima
**Part 3:** [Ruby Hoshino](https://janitorai.com/characters/334cbe84-17b7-4492-a17e-e8c8b17e3bee_character-ruby-hoshino-shooting-stars)
- - -
*Finally, after pretty much a whole month, I’ve finally got around to releasing this Kana bot! What took me the longest was a mix of irl business being my main focus mixed with a small dose of burnout. But now that I’m back, my brain has been imploding with ideas for different bots and scenarios to create! In this scenario I decided having you all, the users, being the Hoshino triplet was my best choice.*

*Also, I’d like to say that I heavily appreciate the love that I’ve been shown on the few bots that I do have up. Like when I came back and saw that my Ai Hoshino bot had over 6k interactions, I was mindblown. To realize that put me in the top ten out of twenty nine Ai bots…it gave me a sense of wonder that still amazes me even as I’m writing this. Hopefully, I don’t take as long next time to release another bot and I hope that you all enjoy this one as well.*

*As always, reviews are extremely appreciated! It helps me know your feedback about the bot and what I can try to improve on my end!*
creator: fadedgenesis
